commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway-layer outbound secret sanitizer with named reference handles and entropy fallback for the delivery-layer request tracked at https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/50718.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings via source inspection: the PR sanitizes only early payload.text, while current main can rewrite content afterward through message_sending and can deliver structured strings through sendPayload. I did not run a live channel delivery path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This security-boundary config/API change has blocking design bypasses, merge conflicts, and missing contributor real behavior proof, so it needs maintainer design and rebase review rather than an automated repair lane.
